item.text:
* 5V single-supply transistor Wien bridge oscillator
VDD VDD 0 DC 5
VREF Vref 0 DC 2.5

Rw1 Vout Vwser 10k
Cw1 Vwser Vinp 10n
Rw2 Vinp Vref 10k
Cw2 Vinp Vref 10n

Rf1 Vout Vflim 3.3k
Rf2 Vflim Vinn 18k
Rg Vinn Vref 10k
Dlim1 Vout Vflim DLIM
Dlim2 Vflim Vout DLIM

Itail ntail 0 DC 260u
M1 nload Vinp ntail ntail NMOS W=180u L=2u
M2 nout1 Vinn ntail ntail NMOS W=180u L=2u
M3 nload nload VDD VDD PMOS W=420u L=2u
M4 nout1 nload VDD VDD PMOS W=420u L=2u

M5 nout2 nout1 VDD VDD PMOS W=560u L=2u
M6 nout2 nbiasn 0 0 NMOS W=220u L=2u

VBN nbiasn 0 DC 1.05
Rdrv nout2 ndrv 3.3k
Cdom ndrv Vout 8p
M7 Vout ndrv VDD VDD PMOS W=420u L=2u
M8 Vout nbiasn 0 0 NMOS W=180u L=2u
Rbleed Vout Vref 100k
Cload Vout 0 50p

.model NMOS NMOS LEVEL=1 VTO=0.7 KP=220u LAMBDA=0.02
.model PMOS PMOS LEVEL=1 VTO=-0.7 KP=90u LAMBDA=0.02
.model DLIM D IS=1n RS=20 N=1.8 CJO=0.2p

.ic V(Vinp)=2.501 V(Vinn)=2.499 V(Vout)=2.55 V(Vwser)=2.6 V(nout1)=2.2 V(nout2)=2.8 V(ndrv)=2.4
.save V(Vout) V(Vinp) V(Vinn)
.tran 1u 5m
.end
